{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lindon's body
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's body]] functions like a [[Dreadgod]]'s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
